calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-16-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Brillant for Gary Scott. Susan Barlevav for Michael Moser. Giulio Accornero for Jens and Ronny Schumann.

Mr. Brillant presented oral argument, explained circumstances as well as work performed and repairs made to the property to support their requests for extraordinary fees. Mr. Accornero and Ms. Barlevav submit to the Court's discretion. Mr. Brillant clarified that his client did not release any personal property to Ms. Menz or Mr. Roloff and explained urgency with respect to the need to make distribution in order to benefit from a DNI tax deduction. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Nancy Bautista/Rosie Noguera. Court Reporter: Jennifer Ferguson (CSR#: 9933, Telephone #: 415-442-1802). Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brian Carrideo for Gary Scott.

Off Calendar Sep-18-2012 Continued To Nov-27-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brian Carideo for Gary Scott (Personal Representative).

Mr. Carideo stated that the issue of the Administrator purchasing a piece of property without a Court order pre-dates his involvement and that they are still in the process of collecting funds from Austria. With respect to the Petition for Instructions, the Court is hoping to see a declaration from the Attorney who prepared the will. The Petition for Instructions was continued to November 27, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to see if something more can be provided to show what the Testator intended. Status on the Petition for Final Distribution was also continued to that date. The Petition for Preliminary Distribution may be set for the same date of November 27, 2012.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1332 - 1334 Van Ness Avenue, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Aug-21-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Brillant for Petitioner.

The sale was confirmed at $3,300,000.00 subject to the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed July 19, 2012. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order). The proceeds from the sale are to be deposited into a blocked account. Status on filing of the receipt for the blocked account was set for September 12, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dpet. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1332 - 1334 Van Ness Avenue, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Aug-10-2012 Continued To Aug-15-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Brillant for Gary Scott.

The Court noted that the re-appraisal was on file, that notice was given to St. Clair and that posting was not done. The Court shortened time for notice to 5 days. The Petition for Confirmation of Sale of Real Property was continued to August 15, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for notice and for posting. Mr. Brillant provided status on the three promissory notes and the inheritance in Austria. Mr. Brillant also advised the Court that he filed a Petition for Instructions regarding scrivener's error and the Heir Hunters.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

Off Calendar Jun-05-2012 Continued To Sep-18-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brian Carideo for Gary Scott.

The Court once again expressed concern about the large balances over the insured limit in the bank accounts. Mr. Carideo stated that Estate taxes are due in July and that the property should also close in July. Status on filing of the Petition for Final Distribution was continued to September 18, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Receipt For The Blocked Account
Off Calendar May-08-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brian Carideo for Gary Scott (Personal Representative).

Mr. Carideo provided an endorsed copy of the Receipt for Blocked Account that was filed this morning. The Court once again expressed concern with regard to the large balance of funds in the bank account which far exceed the insured limits. Status on the Receipt for Blocked Account was taken off calendar. Status on filing of the Petition for Final Distribution and a report on diversification of funds was set for June 5, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

Off Calendar Apr-10-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Brillant for Gary Scott.

The Court raised the issue of a substantial amount of funds on deposit in Wells Fargo Bank. Mr. David stated that he was about six weeks away from filing a Petition for Final Distribution. The Buyer Amad Bayat and the Broker were present. The sale was confirmed at $1,150,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Proceeds from the sale are to be deposited into a blocked account. Status on filing of the receipt for the blocked account was set for May 8, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Andrade/A. Payne.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-08-2011 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-25-2011 Continued To Jun-08-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jon Vaught for Gary Scott.

This matter was on calendar for the purpose of extending the Special Letters. The Court expressed concern about the receipt for the $7,000,000.00 blocked account not being filed. Mr. Vaught stated that the money was in a blocked account, that they contacted Wells Fargo Bank several times, that the Bank was not cooperating and that he did not know what the hold up was. The Petition for Probate of Will was continued to June 8, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Special Letters were also extended to June 8, 2011. The Court advised Counsel that a personal visit to the Bank was needed to find out what is going on.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Chien.
